# vITK (Voting Power)

This page is a redirect to the core concept: [Ai Proxy Optimism](ai-proxy-optimism.md).

**$vITK** is the non-transferable, on-chain voting power generated by locking native [Itk Token](../entities/itk-token.md) utility assets in the Xibalba DAO governance contracts, utilized autonomously by **Guardian Agents**.

*   Read the full guide: [Ai Proxy Optimism](ai-proxy-optimism.md)
*   See related systems: [Itk Token](../entities/itk-token.md), [Rust Oracle](../entities/rust-oracle.md)
